description: Recorded (offline) Fabric Data Agent result over Wide World Importers SalesOrderHeader joined to SalesTerritory. Non-secret fixture used to prove the quota pipeline end to end without a live Fabric round trip.
source_query: SELECT st.SalesTerritory, p.ProductCategory, soh.OrderDate, soh.TotalDue, sod.Quantity FROM SalesOrderHeader soh JOIN SalesTerritory st ON soh.TerritoryID = st.TerritoryID JOIN SalesOrderDetail sod ON soh.SalesOrderID = sod.SalesOrderID JOIN Product p ON sod.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE soh.OrderDate >= DATEADD(month, -12, GETDATE())
